audio_identity.overall_style: CD-based audio with samples and effects
distinctive_elements: CD audio tracks instead of MIDI

note: Limited audio documentation available. Wikipedia confirms Lee Jackson as composer and that a Kurzweil K2500RS keyboard was used, with CD-based audio playback enabling higher quality samples and effects than MIDI. No specific track names, tempos, keys, chord progressions, or SFX characteristics per area were documented in available sources.
